hooks.command: if [ -z "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ] || [ ! -f "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ]; then echo "WARNING: Prettier skipped (file: ${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH:-<empty>})" >&2; exit 0; fi; bunx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || echo "ERROR: Prettier failed on $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env(\.|$)' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.example$' && echo "BLOCK: .env files are protected: $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >&2 && exit 1 || exit 0
